l1: This discipline is under active development — probing commands will be added by the Collaboration tech lead.
To contribute diagnostic commands, see CONTRIBUTING.md in the repository root.
Run 'Test-NetConnection -ComputerName outlook.office365.com -Port 443' to confirm M365 connectivity from the client.
l2: This discipline is under active development — advanced probing will be added by the Collaboration tech lead.
To contribute advanced diagnostic commands, see CONTRIBUTING.md in the repository root.
Run 'Get-MessageTrace -SenderAddress <sender> -RecipientAddress <recipient> -StartDate (Get-Date).AddDays(-7) -EndDate (Get-Date)' to trace mail flow in Exchange Online.

l1: This discipline is under active development — troubleshooting steps will be added by the Collaboration tech lead.
To contribute resolution steps, see CONTRIBUTING.md in the repository root.
Clear the Teams cache: close Teams, delete %appdata%\Microsoft\Teams\Cache — resolves most Teams client issues.
l2: This discipline is under active development — advanced troubleshooting will be added by the Collaboration tech lead.
To contribute advanced resolution steps, see CONTRIBUTING.md in the repository root.
Run 'Test-MAPIConnectivity' in Exchange Online PowerShell to confirm MAPI over HTTPS connectivity for Outlook clients.

l1: This discipline is under active development — data collection steps will be added by the Collaboration tech lead.

Run Microsoft Support and Recovery Assistant (SaRA) to collect diagnostics for Teams, Outlook, and OneDrive issues.
l2: This discipline is under active development — advanced data collection will be added by the Collaboration tech lead.

Export Exchange Online message trace: 'Get-MessageTrace | Export-Csv C:\mail_trace.csv -NoTypeInformation'
